name: Chinese Radish-Cucumber Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cucumber, cut in half, peeled, drained on paper towels for about 15 minutes, and then coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, combine the radishes and cucumber.
2. To make the dressing: In a small bowl, mix together the rice vinegar and soy sauce. Stir in the sugar until dissolved.
3. Pour the dressing over the vegetables, toss thoroughly, and refrigerate until serving time.
4. At serving time, place chilled shredded cabbage on a serving dish. Toss the vegetables again with dressing and spoon on top of the cabbage.
5. Serve immediately.
